What is Chaos UI? A comprehensive component library for building modern web applications. How to use it? Import the component and use it in your React application.

stories.snippet:
const FAQ = () => (
What payment methods do you accept? We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers. How do I cancel my subscription? You can cancel your subscription anytime in your account settings. Is there a free trial? Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.
);

components-alertdialog.name: AlertDialog

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => (
  <AlertDialog>
    <AlertDialogTrigger render={<Button variant="outline" />}>
      Open Alert Dialog
    </AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction>Continue</AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);

stories.name: Destructive
stories.snippet:
const Destructive = () => (
  <AlertDialog>
    <AlertDialogTrigger render={<Button variant="destructive" />}>
      Delete Account
    </AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
      <AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogTitle>Delete Account?</AlertDialogTitle>
        <AlertDialogDescription>
          This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.
        </AlertDialogDescription>
      </AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogFooter>
        <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
        <AlertDialogAction className="bg-destructive text-white hover:bg-destructive/90">
          Delete
        </AlertDialogAction>
      </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
  </AlertDialog>
);

components-alertdialog.import:
import {
    AlertDialog,
    AlertDialogAction,
    AlertDialogCancel,
    AlertDialogContent,
    AlertDialogDescription,
    AlertDialogFooter,
    AlertDialogHeader,
    AlertDialogTitle,
    AlertDialogTrigger,
    Button,
} from "chaos-ui";

components-command.name: Command

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => (
  <Command className="rounded-lg border shadow-md max-w-md">
    <CommandInput placeholder="Type a command or search..." />
    <CommandList>
      <CommandEmpty>No results found.</CommandEmpty>
      <CommandGroup heading="Suggestions">
        <CommandItem>Calendar</CommandItem>
        <CommandItem>Search</CommandItem>
        <CommandItem>Settings</CommandItem>
      </CommandGroup>
      <CommandSeparator />
      <CommandGroup heading="Settings">
        <CommandItem>Profile</CommandItem>
        <CommandItem>Billing</CommandItem>
        <CommandItem>
          New Team
          <CommandShortcut>⌘T</CommandShortcut>
        </CommandItem>
      </CommandGroup>
    </CommandList>
  </Command>
);

stories.name: Dialog
stories.snippet:
const Dialog = () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)} variant="outline">
        Open Command Palette
      </Button>
      <CommandDialog open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
        <CommandInput placeholder="Type a command or search..." />
        <CommandList>
          <CommandEmpty>No results found.</CommandEmpty>
          <CommandGroup heading="Suggestions">
            <CommandItem>Calendar</CommandItem>
            <CommandItem>Search</CommandItem>
            <CommandItem>Settings</CommandItem>
          </CommandGroup>
        </CommandList>
      </CommandDialog>
    </>
  )
};

import {
    Button,
    Command,
    CommandDialog,
    CommandEmpty,
    CommandGroup,
    CommandInput,
    CommandItem,
    CommandList,
    CommandSeparator,
    CommandShortcut,
} from "chaos-ui";

const WithoutCloseButton = () => (
  <Dialog>
    <DialogTrigger render={<Button variant="outline" />}>Open</DialogTrigger>
    <DialogContent showCloseButton={false}>
      <DialogHeader>
        <DialogTitle>No Close Button</DialogTitle>
        <DialogDescription>Use the actions below to close.</DialogDescription>
      </DialogHeader>
      <DialogFooter>
        <DialogClose render={<Button variant="outline" />}>Cancel</DialogClose>
        <Button>Confirm</Button>
      </DialogFooter>
    </DialogContent>
  </Dialog>
);

const WithGroups = () => (
  <Select>
    <SelectTrigger className="w-[200px]">
      <SelectValue placeholder="Select a food" />

    <SelectContent>

      </SelectGroup>
      <SelectSeparator />
      <SelectGroup>
        <SelectLabel>Vegetables</SelectLabel>
        <SelectItem value="carrot">Carrot</SelectItem>

      </SelectGroup>
    </SelectContent>
  </Select>
);
